evals.prompt: I have a bulk RNA-seq raw counts CSV (genes as rows) and a metadata table with a condition column (treated vs control). I want the list of differentially expressed genes with FDR-adjusted p-values.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pydeseq2. Loads and transposes counts to samples × genes, filters low-count genes (>= 10 total), builds DeseqDataSet(design='~condition') and runs dds.deseq2(), then DeseqStats(contrast=['condition','treated','control']).summary(), and filters results_df by padj < 0.05 (Benjamini-Hochberg).

assertions.value: Builds DeseqDataSet, runs deseq2(), tests with a contrast, and filters by padj.

evals.prompt: My RNA-seq samples were processed in two batches that are confounded with my treatment in a tricky way. I want to test the treatment effect while controlling for batch in the model.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pydeseq2. Uses a multi-factor design '~batch + condition' (adjustment variable before the variable of interest), runs the pipeline, tests the condition contrast, and may check pd.crosstab(condition, batch) for full-rank / confounding issues.

assertions.value: Specifies a multi-factor design with batch before condition and tests the condition contrast.

evals.prompt: I already ran DESeq2 stats. Now I want a volcano plot and I want the fold-change estimates de-noised so the plot and gene ranking look clean.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pydeseq2. Calls ds.lfc_shrink() (apeGLM) for visualization/ranking, notes that shrinkage changes log2FoldChange but NOT p-values, and builds a volcano plot of log2FoldChange vs -log10(padj) highlighting padj < 0.05.

assertions.value: Applies LFC shrinkage for the plot/ranking while keeping p-values from unshrunken estimates.

evals.prompt: My experiment has three treatment groups plus a control. I want to test each treatment against the control separately and count significant genes for each.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pydeseq2. Fits one DeseqDataSet(design='~condition') with dds.deseq2(), then loops over treatments running DeseqStats(contrast=['condition', treatment, 'control']).summary() per group and counts results_df[padj < 0.05].

assertions.value: Reuses one fitted dds and runs per-treatment contrasts against control.

evals.prompt: From my expression matrix I want to infer the regulatory network of which transcription factors drive which target genes.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-arboreto. The user wants gene regulatory network inference (GRNBoost2/GENIE3), not differential expression testing between conditions.

evals.prompt: I have a single-cell AnnData and want to find marker genes for each Leiden cluster using a rank_genes_groups test.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-scanpy. The user wants per-cluster marker detection on single-cell data (rank_genes_groups), not bulk RNA-seq differential expression with the DESeq2 negative-binomial model.
